00027 #ifndef JELATINE_OPCODES_H
00028 #   define JELATINE_OPCODES_H (1)
00029 
00030 #include "wrappers.h"
00031 
00034 enum array_type_t {
00035     T_BOOLEAN = 4, 
00036     T_CHAR = 5, 
00037 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00038     T_FLOAT = 6, 
00039     T_DOUBLE = 7, 
00040 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00041     T_BYTE = 8, 
00042     T_SHORT = 9, 
00043     T_INT = 10, 
00044     T_LONG = 11 
00045 };
00046 
00048 typedef enum array_type_t array_type_t;
00049 
00052 enum internal_opcode_t {
00053     NOP = 0, 
00054     ACONST_NULL = 1, 
00055     ICONST_M1 = 2, 
00056     ICONST_0 = 3, 
00057     ICONST_1 = 4, 
00058     ICONST_2 = 5, 
00059     ICONST_3 = 6, 
00060     ICONST_4 = 7, 
00061     ICONST_5 = 8, 
00062     LCONST_0 = 9, 
00063     LCONST_1 = 10, 
00064     FCONST_0 = 11, 
00065     FCONST_1 = 12, 
00066     FCONST_2 = 13, 
00067     DCONST_0 = 14, 
00068     DCONST_1 = 15, 
00069     BIPUSH = 16, 
00070     SIPUSH = 17, 
00071     LDC = 18, 
00072     LDC_W = 19, 
00073     LDC2_W = 20, 
00074     ILOAD = 21, 
00075     LLOAD = 22, 
00076     FLOAD = 23, 
00077     DLOAD = 24, 
00078     ALOAD = 25, 
00079     ILOAD_0 = 26, 
00080     ILOAD_1 = 27, 
00081     ILOAD_2 = 28, 
00082     ILOAD_3 = 29, 
00083     LLOAD_0 = 30,

00308     NEW_FINALIZER = 252, 
00309     LDC_PRELINK = 253, 
00310     LDC_W_PRELINK = 254, 
00311     // The following opcodes are called using the WIDE prefix
00312     METHOD_LOAD = 201, 
00313     METHOD_ABSTRACT = 202, 
00314     INVOKE_NATIVE = 203, 
00315     HALT = 204 
00316 };
00317 
00319 typedef enum internal_opcode_t internal_opcode_t;
